message.content:
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam noteStyle rectangle
skinparam sequenceStyle rectangle

package "finest level" as finest {
  note U(k,2) -> F(U(k,2))
  note U(k',2) -> F(U(k',2))
  note U(k'',2) = U(k',2) + P*c(1)
  note U(k+,2) -> F(U(k+,2))
}

package "intermediate level(s)" as intermediate {
  note U(k,1) -> F(U(k,1))
  note U(k',1) -> F(U(k',1))
  note U(k'',1) = U(k',1) + P*c(0)
  note U(k+,1) -> F(U(k+,1))
}

package "base level" as base {
  note U(k,0) -> F(U(k,0))
  note U(k+,0) -> F(U(k+,0))
  note c(0) = U(k+,0) - R*U(k',1)
  note c(1) = U(k+,1) - R*U(k',2)
}

finest -> intermediate : restrict
intermediate -> base : restrict
base -> intermediate : prolongate
intermediate -> finest : prolongate

finest -> finest : SDC
intermediate -> intermediate : FAS
intermediate -> intermediate : SDC with FAS
base -> base : FAS
base -> base : SDC with FAS
base -> base : coarse correction
intermediate -> intermediate : coarse correction
intermediate -> intermediate : correct
finest -> finest : correct

note tau = Q(1)*F(U(k,1)) - R*Q(2)*F(U(k',2))
note tau = Q(0)*F(U(k,0)) - R*Q(1)*F(U(k',1))

@enduml
